verdict: A well-structured and rhythmic chart with excellent pacing, though it relies a bit too heavily on repetitive loop patterns in the chorus.

issues.problem: Highly repetitive use of the 'JUMP LR -> U -> D -> L -> JUMP LR' pattern. While accurate to the rhythm, playing the exact same physical loop five times in a short window feels monotonous.
The transition from U -> D -> L after a JUMP LR forces either an awkward double-step on the left foot (D -> L) or a heavy crossover. This layout repeats frequently during the chorus.
The outro sequence repeats the exact same 'D -> U -> L -> R' flow verbatim, missing an opportunity for a mirrored variation to make the finish more engaging.
